calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Order Compelling Response To Pltf'S Request For Production Of Documents And First Set Of Interrogatories; Order Deeming Admissions Admitted And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Matter on calendar for Monday, February 1, 2010. PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC's Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents And First Set Of Interrogatories, For Order Deeming Requests For Admissions Deemed Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's Requests For Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $265, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewllett. Not reported.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Sep-23-2009 Denied
